name: Kensei
description: A class that relies solely on his sword

skills.name: Sword's path
skills.description: Do not deal damage on hit. Instead Charge your attack and then deal all damage at once (2s cooldown). Increase damage for 8% with each hit

skills.name: Master's Tempo
skills.description: Every 10/8/7/6/4-th hit hits twice for a total of 125% damage

skills.name: Swordmaster's Instinct
skills.description: Display a skull indicator above an enemy when Sword's Path damage exceeds 120% of their health.

skills.name: Flawless Precision
skills.description: You cannot crit, but Sword's Path damage is increased by 1/2/2/3/5% for every 10% of your crit chance.

skills.name: Kensei’s Burden
skills.description: Increase *Swordmaster's Instinct* threshhold to 175% of enemy health. Increase *Sword's path* damage by 2%. If you deal damage exceeding 100% of the target's health, you die.
